steps.title: Capture the study result
steps.content: The passage reports higher park use among Panama City respondents than Fortaleza respondents, then says this difference cannot be due to greater access to desired amenities near Panama City parks.

steps.title: Reject unsupported causes
steps.content: Choice A claims Panama City has more amenities overall, but the passage only compares access to amenities near parks. Choice B predicts future increases in park use, which the passage does not do. Choice C attributes the difference to greater park prevalence, a factor never mentioned. The remaining choice states both the higher-use finding and the rejection of amenity access as the explanation. The answer is D.
